---
title: "Macrophage & Fibroblast condition DE — edgeR pseudobulk"
output: html_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(anndata)
  library(edgeR)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(Matrix)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(tibble)
})

h5ad_path <- 'st_data.h5ad'
corr_path <- 'untreated_dc1_pearson_correlation.csv'
res_dir   <- 'results/de'
fig_dir   <- file.path(here::here(), 'figures/de')
dir.create(res_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

MIN_CELLS  <- 10
CELL_TYPES <- c("Macrophage", "Fibroblast")

```

# Load data

```{r load_data}
adata <- read_h5ad(h5ad_path)
cat("Total cells:", nrow(adata$obs), "\n")
cat("Total genes:", ncol(adata), "\n")
```

```{r subset_celltypes}
ct_mask <- adata$obs$cell_annotation %in% CELL_TYPES
adata_sub <- adata[ct_mask, ]
cat("Cells after CT subset:", nrow(adata_sub$obs), "\n")
print(table(adata_sub$obs$cell_annotation))
```

```{r assign_condition}
obs <- adata_sub$obs %>%
  mutate(
    cond_group = case_when(
      condition_num == 0  ~ "ctrl",
      condition_num > 1   ~ "treated",
      TRUE                ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

cat("Condition group counts:\n")
print(table(obs$cond_group, useNA = "always"))
```

# Compute percent expressed per gene per cell type

```{r pct_expressed}
counts_mat <- adata_sub$layers[["counts_segger"]]

pct_expressed <- lapply(CELL_TYPES, function(ct) {
  idx <- which(obs$cell_annotation == ct)
  mat_ct <- counts_mat[idx, , drop = FALSE]
  pct <- Matrix::colMeans(mat_ct > 0) * 100
  data.frame(
    gene          = colnames(counts_mat),
    cell_type     = ct,
    pct_expressed = as.numeric(pct),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}) %>% bind_rows()
```

# Pseudobulk aggregation

```{r filter_condition}
keep <- !is.na(obs$cond_group)
obs_f       <- obs[keep, ]
counts_mat_f <- counts_mat[keep, , drop = FALSE]

cat("Cells with assigned condition group:", nrow(obs_f), "\n")
print(table(obs_f$cell_annotation, obs_f$cond_group))
```

```{r pseudobulk_fn}
pseudobulk_ct <- function(ct) {
  idx <- which(obs_f$cell_annotation == ct)
  obs_ct    <- obs_f[idx, ]
  mat_ct    <- counts_mat_f[idx, , drop = FALSE]

  agg_key <- paste(obs_ct$sample_name, obs_ct$cond_group, sep = "__")
  cell_counts <- table(agg_key)

  keep_pb <- names(cell_counts)[cell_counts >= MIN_CELLS]
  keep_cells <- agg_key %in% keep_pb

  obs_ct  <- obs_ct[keep_cells, ]
  mat_ct  <- mat_ct[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
  agg_key <- agg_key[keep_cells]

  pb_levels <- unique(agg_key)
  pb_mat <- sapply(pb_levels, function(k) {
    Matrix::colSums(mat_ct[agg_key == k, , drop = FALSE])
  })

  pb_meta <- obs_ct %>%
    mutate(pb_key = agg_key) %>%
    group_by(pb_key) %>%
    summarise(
      sample_name = first(sample_name),
      cond_group  = first(cond_group),
      n_cells     = n(),
      .groups     = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(match(pb_key, pb_levels))

  list(counts = pb_mat, meta = pb_meta, cell_type = ct)
}

pb_list <- lapply(CELL_TYPES, pseudobulk_ct)
names(pb_list) <- CELL_TYPES
```

```{r summarise_pb}
for (ct in CELL_TYPES) {
  cat("\n--- ", ct, " ---\n", sep = "")
  print(table(pb_list[[ct]]$meta$cond_group))
}
```

# edgeR DE

```{r run_edger_fn}
run_edgeR <- function(pb) {
  mat  <- pb$counts
  meta <- pb$meta
  ct   <- pb$cell_type

  group_counts <- table(meta$cond_group)
  if (any(group_counts < 2)) {
    warning(ct, ": fewer than 2 samples in a group, skipping.")
    return(NULL)
  }

  meta$cond_group <- factor(meta$cond_group, levels = c("ctrl", "treated"))

  dge <- DGEList(counts = mat, samples = meta, group = meta$cond_group)
  dge <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")

  design <- model.matrix(~ cond_group, data = meta)
  dge    <- estimateDisp(dge, design)
  fit    <- glmQLFit(dge, design)
  res    <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = "cond_grouptreated")

  tt <- topTags(res, n = Inf, sort.by = "none")$table %>%
    rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
    mutate(cell_type = ct)

  tt
}

de_results <- lapply(pb_list, run_edgeR) %>%
  Filter(Negate(is.null), .) %>%
  bind_rows()
```

```{r join_pct}
de_results <- de_results %>%
  left_join(pct_expressed, by = c("gene", "cell_type"))

head(de_results)
```

```{r load_correlation}
corr_df <- read.csv(corr_path)

de_results = left_join(de_results, corr_df,by = c('gene', 'cell_type'), suffix = c('.de', '.cor'))


de_results <- de_results %>%
  mutate(is_basal_corr = rho > .7 & pct_expressing > .1)

cat("DE genes that are basal-correlated:", sum(de_results$is_basal_corr, na.rm = T), "\n")
```

# Summary

```{r summary_stats}
de_results %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genes_tested = n(),
    n_sig_fdr05    = sum(FDR < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sig_fdr01    = sum(FDR < 0.01, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

# Volcano plot

```{r volcano_fn}
plot_volcano_tufte <- function(de_df, n_top = 10,
                               pval_thresh = 0.1, lfc_thresh = 0.5,
                               pct_expressed_thresh = 10,
                               pct_expressing_thresh = 0.1,
                               up_color = "#c0392b", dn_color = "#2980b9",
                               ns_color = "#bdc3c7",
                               basal_color = "#e74c3c") {
  df <- de_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(pct_expressed > pct_expressed_thresh) %>%
    mutate(
      neg_log10_fdr = -log10(pmax(FDR, 1e-300)),
      direction = case_when(
        FDR < pval_thresh & logFC > lfc_thresh  & pct_expressed > pct_expressed_thresh  ~ "up",
        FDR < pval_thresh & logFC < -lfc_thresh & pct_expressed > pct_expressed_thresh  ~ "down",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      )
    )

  # Top 10 up-regulated genes

  top_up <- df %>% filter(direction == "up") %>%
    slice_max(logFC, n = n_top, with_ties = FALSE)

  # All basal-correlated down-regulated genes
  basal_dn <- df %>% filter(direction == "down", is_basal_corr == TRUE)

  to_label <- bind_rows(top_up, basal_dn) %>%
    mutate(text_color = ifelse(is_basal_corr, basal_color, "black"))

  n_up <- sum(df$direction == "up")
  n_dn <- sum(df$direction == "down")

  ggplot(df, aes(x = logFC, y = neg_log10_fdr, color = direction)) +
    geom_point(size = 1.2, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("up" = up_color, "down" = dn_color, "ns" = ns_color)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(pval_thresh), linetype = "dashed",
               color = "#7f8c8d", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted",
               color = "#7f8c8d", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = to_label,
      aes(label = gene),
      color = to_label$text_color,
      size = 2.5,
      max.overlaps = 20,
      segment.size = 0.3,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = paste0("↑ ", n_up),
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = up_color) +
    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = -Inf, label = paste0("↓ ", n_dn),
             hjust = -0.1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = dn_color) +
    labs(x = expression(log[2]~"fold change (late / early)"),
         y = expression(-log[10]~FDR),
         caption = "Red text = basal-correlated genes") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "gray90"),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.5),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      plot.caption = element_text(color = basal_color, size = 8, hjust = 1)
    )
}
```



```{r volcano_plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
gp <- de_results %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  group_map(~ plot_volcano_tufte(.x, pct_expressed_thresh = 4) + ggtitle(.y$cell_type), .keep = TRUE) %>%
  patchwork::wrap_plots(ncol = 2)

gp
```

```{r save_volcano}
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, 'mac_fib_DE_day0_vs_late_pctexp4.svg'), gp,
       height = 5, width = 10)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, 'mac_fib_DE_day0_vs_late_pctexp4.pdf'), gp,
       height = 5, width = 10)
```

# Top DE genes

```{r top_genes}
de_results %>%
  filter(FDR < 0.05) %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  #slice_max(abs(logFC), n = 20) %>%
  arrange(cell_type, desc(abs(logFC))) %>%
  select(cell_type, gene, logFC, FDR, pct_expressed, is_basal_corr)
```

# Save results

```{r save_csv}
out_path <- file.path(res_dir, "mac_fib_condition0_vs_gt1_edgeR.csv")
write.csv(de_results, out_path, row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
cat("Saved:", out_path, "\n")
```

```{r read_csv}
de_results = readr::read_csv(out_path)
```


# Session info

```{r session_info}
sessionInfo()
```
